name: config_flows
full_help:
config_flows

Description: 
Config Flow

Syntax: 
config_flows  [-mark_debug <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-mark_debug]  Allows nets with MARK_DEBUG to be optimized instead of 
                 preserved.
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Allows nets with MARK_DEBUG to be optimized instead of preserved.
Suspend message limits during command execution
